definition.title: Truck Sleeping Cab Makeovers (HGTV-Style Contest Campaign)
definition.objective: Generate PR, UGC, and One Home membership interest via national cab makeover contest. HGTV reveal format is shareable and press-worthy. Leverages existing organic behavior.
definition.target_audience: Truck drivers (contestants), cab/sprinter-van makeover communities, HGTV-style content audiences, trucker wives/families, influencer followings
definition.cadence: CONCEPT PHASE. Needs attention. Awaiting Alexis research + influencer list.

next_actions: Move from concept to production plan

campaign_card.target_audience: Truck drivers (contestants), cab/sprinter-van makeover communities, HGTV-style content audiences, trucker wives/families, influencer followings
campaign_card.campaign_name: Truck Sleeping Cab Makeovers (HGTV-Style Contest Campaign)
key_messages: You deserve a space that feels like yours
We will makeover your cab AND give you a home base on every major corridor
HGTV-style reveal format — shareable, press-worthy, and UGC-generating

initiatives: Reveal video. UGC from contestants. Influencer amplification. Behind the scenes series. Before/after statics. One Home integration.

_legacy_card.description: National truck-cabin makeover contest modeled on HGTV-style reveal format. Partner with cab/sprinter-van makeover influencers. PR + UGC + One Home membership leads.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Generate PR, UGC, and One Home membership interest via national cab makeover contest. HGTV reveal format is shareable and press-worthy. Leverages existing organic behavior.
_legacy_card.asset_links: No produced assets yet — concept phase. ACTION: Alexis compiling influencer list + contest concept.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: HGTV reveal format. Influencer partnership. One Home tie-in. Before/after transformation.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: TBD — depends on contest prize, influencer costs, and reveal video production.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Reveal video. UGC from contestants. Influencer amplification. Behind the scenes series. Before/after statics. One Home integration.
_legacy_card.timeline: CONCEPT PHASE. Needs attention. Awaiting Alexis research + influencer list.
